## Checklist

- [ ] **Node 22.x** (see `.nvmrc`); `npm ci` / `npm install` succeed with repo `.npmrc` (`engine-strict=true`)
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` pass locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (or `vercel build` if that is your deploy path)
- [ ] NAP / contact details unchanged unless intentionally updated to match GBP
